lede: A look at May 19 through the almanac — historic events, famous birthdays including Mustafa Kemal Atatürk and Livio Berruti, and the day's notable deaths and observances.

events.title: Wedding of Prince Harry and Meghan Markle
events.desc: The wedding of Prince Harry and Meghan Markle is held at St George's Chapel, Windsor, with an estimated global audience of 1.9 billion.

events.title: Royal Thai Armed Forces
events.desc: The Royal Thai Armed Forces concludes its crackdown on protests by forcing the surrender of United Front for Democracy Against Dictatorship leaders.

events.title: Sierra Gorda
events.desc: The Sierra Gorda biosphere, the most ecologically diverse region in Mexico, is established as a result of grassroots efforts.

events.title: United States Congress
events.desc: The United States Congress passes the Emergency Quota Act establishing national quotas on immigration.

events.title: John Franklin
events.desc: Captain Sir John Franklin and his ill-fated Arctic expedition depart from Greenhithe, England.

events.title: New England's Dark Day
events.desc: New England's Dark Day, an unusual darkening of the day sky, is observed over the New England states and parts of Canada.

events.title: American Revolutionary War
events.desc: American Revolutionary War: A Continental Army garrison surrenders in the Battle of The Cedars.

events.title: Jean-Pierre Christin
events.desc: Jean-Pierre Christin develops the centigrade temperature scale.

events.title: John III Sobieski
events.desc: John III Sobieski becomes king of Poland-Lithuania.

births.name: Mustafa Kemal Atatürk
births.line: (official birthday), Turkish field marshal and statesman, 1st President of Turkey

births.name: Pol Pot
births.line: Cambodian general and politician, 29th Prime Minister of Cambodia

deaths.text: Stanislav Petrov, Lt. Colonel in Soviet Air Defence Forces
Johann Friedrich von Eschscholtz, Estonian-German physician, botanist, and entomologist
Vladimir II Monomakh, Grand Prince of Kiev

observances.text: Christian feast day: Dunstan (Roman Catholic Church, Eastern Orthodox Church; commemoration, Anglicanism)
Christian feast day: Joaquina Vedruna de Mas
Christian feast day: Pudentiana (Roman Catholic Church, Eastern Orthodox Church)
